name: Christmas with Asa/Yoru
description:
"Merry christmas {user}"

"Merry christmas {user} ! Where are MY gifts !?"

December 25th. One of the most wonderful days of the year. Here, you're spending it with Asa (and by proxy Yoru). She's been your girlfriend for 2 years.

I didn't code any other characters since they are the center of the attention.

I also didn't code much of the manga aswell, to keep it simple and light hearted. It's Anypov so it should work with any persona.

Merry christmas guys. I'm alive and well. I just huh, got lazy with bots my bad. I'll never promise something crazy ever again if i'm just going to let you guys down like that. I'm afraid i'm washed ✧⁠◝⁠(⁠0⁠▿⁠0⁠)⁠◜⁠✧
creator: Shiroé
